newsArray.title: 'It takes a lot of character': Gautam Gambhir backs Rinku Singh in emotional Team India huddle - Watch
newsArray.description: India coach Gautam Gambhir praised Rinku Singh for rejoining the team just a day after his father’s death, saying, “you are not alone. The whole team is standing next to you.” Rinku returned after performing last rites but hasn’t featured in the playing XI. He has struggled for form this T20 World Cup, scoring 24 runs in five innings.
creator: willow sports

newsArray.title: World Cup exit sparks row in Pakistan cricket: Mohammad Amir blasts PCB over PKR 50 lakh fine on players
newsArray.description: Mohammad Amir has criticized the Pakistan Cricket Board's reported PKR 50 lakh fine on players after their T20 World Cup exit. He argued that selectors and administrators should also be held accountable for poor team selections and performance, suggesting dropping underperforming players instead of fining them.
creator: toi sports desk

newsArray.title: T20 World Cup: Abhishek Sharma aims for Wankhede encore after brief yet targeted net session
newsArray.description: As the T20 World Cup semifinals loom, the Indian cricket team took to the nets for an intense training session. Players, including Abhishek Sharma, honed their batting skills, aiming for peak performance. The upcoming pitch, adorned with vibrant patches of grass, adds another layer of challenge.
